descriptions: Level number progression differs
Coin count differs from reference
The user progress data (levels and coin amounts) does not match the reference state.
Game board marble configuration differs
Confetti particle distribution patterns differ across the two screens.
Marble board is more crowded with additional marbles filling more holes
Marble board content layout is mismatched, indicating a different level state or randomized positioning.
Game board has different ball arrangement
Board is a different puzzle configuration entirely - different grid size, ball count, positions, and colors of the goal pockets
The game board state (balls and shooters placement) does not match the reference design state at all, indicating a completely different level configuration or randomized placement.
Coin count is significantly different
Coin count value differs significantly
The coin count in the bottom-left HUD displays a different value.
Game board dimensions are different
Game board is smaller and positioned differently on screen
Background shows game elements instead of clean purple
Background shows unrelated game elements (wooden panel, level indicator, buttons) instead of the plain solid purple background
An incorrect brown wooden block/board background is visible behind the dialog in OURS, which obscures the main background elements.
Settings panel appears slightly higher on screen
Close (X) icon uses a text-based 'X' letter instead of the graphic cross icon, and its position/style differs slightly
The header banner ribbon 'SETTINGS' has clipping issues at the bottom left and right wings.
Coin counter positioning differs
LEVEL 4 text overlaps with COMPLETED text instead of sitting above it in its own banner space

The green 'LEVEL 4 COMPLETED' ribbon is incorrectly layered and lacks its proper multi-dimensional shape; it appears flat and extends straight to the edges of the card, cutting off the card's rounded top corners.
Reward text color differs
Coin counter pill uses wrong color scheme
The top-right coin display counter has a completely different dark-blue, semi-transparent color instead of the active bright blue style.
Reward amount text style differs
REWARD and +25 text color differs
The 'Next' button text and 'REWARD' text have slightly different fonts and stroke weights.
Total coin count differs significantly
Coin counter value differs
Number of coin icons in counter
Coin icon in top counter differs
Green button has wrong text
Green button label differs
The text on the primary green button is different.
Emoji shows different expression
Emoji used differs
The emoji/icon displayed in the center of the dialog is different.
Banner ribbon shape differs
Entire card is shifted up and cropped, cutting off top spacing
The red 'FAILED' banner at the top of the dialog is broken, stretched excessively horizontally, and cuts off improperly at the wings.
Main panel height is shorter
Card and banner appear scaled larger relative to screen, causing edges to be cut off on both sides
The text and button styling look flatter with less pronounced shadows, and the yellow RETRY button is wider.
'LEVEL 4' text overlaps with 'FAILED' text due to spacing/sizing differences
The 'LEVEL 4' text is partially obscured by the 'FAILED' text overlapping on top of it.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 74% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
